title: Bedwars Chat Stats
description:
mod that sends information about your hypixel bedwars enemies to your party chat
(combined stars, fkdr, and wlr)
body:
mod that sends information about your hypixel bedwars enemies to your party chat

it sends combined stars, combined fkdr, and combined wlr

fkdr and wlr is like everyones individual fks divided by fds added together (wins and losses for wlr)

it also sends winstreaks if anyone on the team has a winstreak above 50

![4s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c73c00d8788c237e79e0760bc6b4acc3356421a.png)

![2s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c89f8d2bf6ad203fa0ff35208c39b20c8eff174b.png)

more features will be added, see todo list [here](https://github.com/luckycdev/bwchatstats/blob/main/README.md)

[source code](https://github.com/luckycdev/bwchatstats/tree/main) | [support discord](https://discord.gg/UuFJdcEsmw)
